name: Citizens
description_short: Citizens is a retail bank offering checking, savings, home loans, student loans, and credit cards through physical branch locations including this Long Island City, NY branch.
description_long: Citizens is a traditional retail bank operating physical branch locations across the New York area, including their Long Island City branch at 24-15 Queens Plaza North. The company positions itself as a consumer banking provider focused on helping customers "bank better" with personalized financial guidance. They offer a comprehensive suite of banking products including checking and savings accounts, home borrowing solutions, student loans, and credit cards. The Long Island City branch operates Monday-Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, with weekend closures, and provides in-person banking services supported by a mobile app for remote account management. Citizens emphasizes low minimum balances for checking accounts, flexible savings options ranging from basic savings to money market accounts and CDs, and competitive home borrowing terms that address down payments and closing costs. Their approach focuses on accessibility through multiple channels—physical branches, online banking, and mobile applications—while offering personalized banker consultations for complex financial decisions like home purchases, college planning, and retirement savings. The branch network includes nearby locations in Woodside and Brooklyn, suggesting regional expansion within Queens and the greater New York metropolitan area. Citizens positions itself as a relationship-driven bank rather than a fintech challenger, relying on traditional branch infrastructure and in-person customer service as core differentiators. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended weekday hours (9 AM-5 PM Monday-Friday) accommodating working professionals
Multiple nearby branch locations within 1.62 miles for customer convenience
Comprehensive product offering including checking, savings, home loans, student loans, and credit cards in one institution
Free mobile banking app with balance checks, bill pay, money transfers, and ATM locator
Low minimum balance requirements highlighted as a key checking account feature
In-person banker consultations available for complex financial planning and home buying
Flexible savings products including basic savings, money markets, and CDs
cons: Limited weekend access with Saturday-Sunday closure and Saturday lobby hours restricted to 9 AM-1 PM
No drive-up service mentioned at this location, requiring in-person visits for certain transactions
No information provided about specific APRs, deposit insurance limits, or account fee structures
Physical branch dependency may be inconvenient for customers preferring fully digital banking
Limited transparency on this webpage regarding credit card rewards, loan terms, or competitive rates
best_for: Customers seeking traditional full-service banking with in-person support for major financial decisions
Long Island City and Queens residents within proximity to their branch network
Customers planning home purchases or college financing who value personalized banker consultation
Individuals preferring a single financial institution for multiple banking products
diagnosis: Citizens is best suited for consumers in the Long Island City and Queens area seeking full-service retail banking with the ability to meet bankers in person for complex financial decisions like home purchases or student loan planning. The main caveat is that their digital-only alternatives are limited; this branch operates only during weekday business hours with no drive-up service, making it less convenient for customers requiring 24/7 access or those in other geographic markets.
services: Checking accounts with low minimum balances
Savings accounts and money market accounts
Student loans and college savings products
Credit cards with rewards and low APR options
Mobile banking app for account management
ATM and banking center locator services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 24-15 Queens Plaza N, Long Island City, NY 11101
